name: CM_LIST_VERTICAL
description: Complete vertical list screen assembly with title bar, scrollable list view, and gradient masks. Combines TitleWithArrow and VerticalListView components. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Standard layout for list-based screens.
visualForm: Title bar with back arrow (50px) → scrollable list area (190px) → top/bottom gradient masks for scroll indication
descriptionKo: 타이틀 바, 스크롤 가능한 리스트 뷰, 그라디언트 마스크를 결합한 완전한 세로 리스트 화면입니다. TitleWithArrow와 VerticalListView를 조합해 리스트 기반 화면의 표준 레이아웃을 제공합니다.
descriptionEn: Complete vertical list screen assembly with title bar, scrollable list view, and gradient masks. Combines TitleWithArrow and VerticalListView components. Gradient masks at top and bottom indicate scrollable content. Standard layout for list-based screens.
